cells.rationale: Destructive schema migration, but every correctness invariant is named and mechanically test-gated (refold-equivalence suite, fingerprint pin, migration-ladder guards) with explicit rejected-alternatives stop conditions — the hardest well-specified tier, not an unnamed-invariant opus case. Human-directed GPT-first reassignment.

Docs pruning whose discipline constraints are spec-dictated and enforced by lint gates (CLAUDE.md lint, domain-doc lint, retired-name checks); the additive content is enumerated in the spec. Wording-sensitivity handled a half-step above terra. Human-directed GPT-first reassignment.
